hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】市场对美联储降息的希望正在迅速破灭；【FINANCE】摩根大通在降低软件贷款后限制向私人信贷公司提供贷款；【WORLD】南非谴责美国新任大使，表现出反抗态度。

items.title: Markets' hopes for Fed interest rate cuts are rapidly fading away
items.summary: As both energy prices and inflation fears pop higher, expectations for cuts are sliding lower.
items.title_zh: 市场对美联储降息的希望正在迅速破灭
items.summary_zh: 随着能源价格和通胀担忧的加剧，削减开支的预期正在下降。

items.title: JPMorgan Chase reins in lending to private credit firms after marking down software loans
items.summary: JPMorgan's move shows that the biggest U.S. bank by assets wants to get ahead of potential turbulence involving private credit loans to software companies.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通在降低软件贷款后限制向私人信贷公司提供贷款
items.summary_zh: 摩根大通的举动表明，按资产计算，这家美国最大的银行希望在涉及向软件公司提供私人信贷贷款的潜在动荡之前先行一步。

items.title: In Scolding the New U.S. Ambassador, South Africa Signals Defiance
items.summary: The latest clash between the two countries illustrates the depths to which relations have sunk and the struggle to forge a new path forward.
items.title_zh: 南非谴责美国新任大使，表现出反抗态度
items.summary_zh: 两国之间最近的冲突说明了两国关系已经陷入的深度以及开辟新的前进道路的斗争。

items.title: Crypto broker Bitpanda bets on banks and tokenization to expand globally ahead of IPO plans
items.summary: The Vienna-based crypto broker eyes emerging markets, teaming up with institutions rather than competing with local exchanges, said Vishal Sacheendran, VP of global markets strategy and operations.
items.title_zh: 加密货币经纪商 Bitpanda 押注于银行和代币化，以在 IPO 计划之前进行全球扩张
items.summary_zh: 全球市场战略和运营副总裁 Vishal Sacheendran 表示，这家总部位于维也纳的加密货币经纪商着眼于新兴市场，与机构合作，而不是与当地交易所竞争。

items.title: Bitcoin beat the S&P 500, Nasdaq Composite and gold since the start of the Iran war
items.summary: ProShares' Simeon Hyman is highlighting a bullish bitcoin trend.
items.title_zh: 自伊朗战争爆发以来，比特币击败了标准普尔 500 指数、纳斯达克综合指数和黄金
items.summary_zh: ProShares 的 Simeon Hyman 强调了看涨的比特币趋势。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Trump Pressures NATO Allies and China for Warships to Guard Oil Shipments
items.summary: Iran has largely closed the Strait of Hormuz to America and its allies, but the president’s earlier call for more naval reinforcements has gained little traction. The U.S. energy secretary, Chris Wright, acknowledged energy prices could remain high.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：特朗普向北约盟国和中国施压，要求其军舰保护石油运输
items.summary_zh: 伊朗已基本上对美国及其盟国关闭了霍尔木兹海峡，但总统早些时候呼吁增加海军增援的呼声并未得到多少支持。美国能源部长克里斯·赖特承认能源价格可能仍居高不下。

items.title: Bitcoin sold off first when the U.S.-Iran war began. Two weeks later, it's outperforming nearly everything
items.summary: Each escalation in the Iran conflict has been larger than the last, but each bitcoin drawdown has been getting smaller.
items.title_zh: 美伊战争爆发时，比特币首先遭到抛售。两周后，它的表现几乎胜过一切
items.summary_zh: 伊朗冲突的每次升级都比上一次更大，但每次比特币的跌幅却越来越小。

items.title: Ethereum Foundation sells 5,000 ETH to Tom Lee’s BitMine in $10 million OTC deal
items.summary: The deal is the EF's second known OTC sale to a corporate buyer, following a 10,000 ETH sale to SharpLink Gaming in July 2025.
items.title_zh: 以太坊基金会以 1000 万美元的场外交易向 Tom Lee 的 BitMine 出售 5,000 ETH
items.summary_zh: 该交易是 EF 继 2025 年 7 月向 SharpLink Gaming 出售 10,000 ETH 后，第二次向企业买家进行已知的场外交易。

items.title: Ethereum Foundation publishes mandate outlining its role as ‘one of many stewards’ of the network
items.summary: The Ethereum Foundation mandate codifies Ethereum’s core “CROPS” principles: censorship resistance, open source, privacy and security.
items.title_zh: 以太坊基金会发布任务，概述其作为网络“众多管理者之一”的角色
items.summary_zh: 以太坊基金会的任务规定了以太坊的核心“CROPS”原则：抗审查、开源、隐私和安全。

items.title: Dividend stocks are catching up to tech stocks on a key earnings metric at a critical time for the market
items.summary: Dividend stocks are closing the earnings growth gap with tech stocks, a reason for investors seeking safety in a volatile market to favor income opportunities.
items.title_zh: 在市场的关键时刻，股息股在一项关键盈利指标上正在追赶科技股
items.summary_zh: 股息股正在缩小与科技股的盈利增长差距，这是投资者在动荡的市场中寻求安全以青睐收入机会的原因。

items.title: Inside JPMorgan Chase's push to become the startup world’s new Silicon Valley Bank
items.summary: For JPMorgan Chase, winning the niche of startup banking from rivals is about more than just gaining deposits: It's a bet to future-proof the largest U.S. bank.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通致力于成为初创企业界的新硅谷银行
items.summary_zh: 对于摩根大通来说，从竞争对手手中赢得初创银行业务的利基市场不仅仅是获得存款：这是对美国最大银行面向未来的赌注。

items.title: Why China can withstand oil's surge past $100 more easily than other countries
items.summary: The latest Middle East tensions sheds light on how the world's three largest oil consumers have taken different approaches to energy, with global consequences.
items.title_zh: 为什么中国比其他国家更容易承受油价突破100美元的考验
items.summary_zh: 最近的中东紧张局势揭示了世界三大石油消费国如何对能源采取不同的态度，并产生了全球后果。

items.title: China says 'thorough preparations' needed as Trump-Xi meeting hangs in the balance amid Iran war
items.summary: China's top diplomat Wang Yi signaled preparations are underway for a planned meeting between the presidents of the U.S. and China.
items.title_zh: 中国表示，特习会在伊朗战争中悬而未决，需要“彻底准备”
items.summary_zh: 中国最高外交官王毅表示，中美两国元首计划会晤的准备工作正在进行中。

items.title: 'A new norm': BBC visits Doha market starting to fill up again two weeks into Iran war
items.summary: The BBC's International News correspondent, Barbara Plett Usher, visits Doha's Souq Waqif market as strikes in the region continue.
items.title_zh: “新常态”：BBC 访问多哈市场，伊朗战争两周后开始再次拥挤
items.summary_zh: 英国广播公司国际新闻记者芭芭拉·普莱特·厄舍 (Barbara Plett Usher) 在该地区的罢工仍在继续之际参观了多哈的瓦吉夫集市 (Souq Waqif)。

items.title: Ukraine's urgent fight on the financial frontline
items.summary: The war-torn country is battling to secure crucial funding from the IMF and EU, as well as putting up taxes.
items.title_zh: 乌克兰金融前线的紧急战斗
items.summary_zh: 这个饱受战争蹂躏的国家正在努力争取国际货币基金组织和欧盟的重要资金以及税收。

items.title: Cuban protesters ransack Communist office as energy crisis deepens
items.summary: Discontent is mounting over rolling blackouts and shortages of food, fuel and medicine, exacerbated by a US blockade.
items.title_zh: 随着能源危机加深，古巴抗议者洗劫共产党办公室
items.summary_zh: 人们对轮流停电以及食品、燃料和药品短缺的不满情绪日益高涨，美国的封锁更是加剧了这种不满情绪。

items.title: Pakistani-Afghan War Takes Heavy Toll on Civilians
items.summary: Pakistani airstrikes have killed at least 75 civilians and displaced 115,000 in Afghanistan, with both sides vowing escalation and no talks in sight.
items.title_zh: 巴基斯坦-阿富汗战争造成大量平民伤亡
items.summary_zh: 巴基斯坦的空袭已造成阿富汗至少 75 名平民死亡，11.5 万人流离失所，双方都誓言升级，而且看不到任何谈判的迹象。

items.title: Nordic Leaders Praise Carney as They Discuss Arctic Security
items.summary: Canada’s prime minister got a warm welcome from leaders still smarting about President Trump’s remarks two months ago about taking over Greenland.
items.title_zh: 北欧领导人在讨论北极安全时赞扬卡尼
items.summary_zh: 加拿大总理受到了领导人的热烈欢迎，各国领导人仍然对特朗普总统两个月前关于接管格陵兰岛的言论感到不满。

items.title: 4 Palestinians Killed When Israeli Forces Open Fire on West Bank Family
items.summary: Six members of a Palestinian family went out for a ride in the car. Only two made it back home.
items.title_zh: 以色列军队向西岸家庭开火 4 名巴勒斯坦人丧生
items.summary_zh: 一个巴勒斯坦家庭的六名成员乘车出去兜风。只有两个人成功回到家。

items.title: A Timeline of the Fraught Relationship Between Iran and the U.S.
items.summary: The governments of both countries have repeatedly cast the other as evil, perpetuating a cycle that has culminated in the present war.
items.title_zh: 伊朗与美国之间紧张关系的时间表
items.summary_zh: 两国政府一再将对方视为邪恶，使恶性循环持续下去，最终导致了当前的战争。

items.title: AI agents are quietly rewriting prediction market trading
items.summary: Valory co-founder David Minarsch says autonomous agents running on the Olas protocol are giving retail traders a 24/7, strategy-driven edge on platforms like Polymarket.
items.title_zh: AI智能体正在悄然改写预测市场交易
items.summary_zh: Valory 联合创始人 David Minarsch 表示，在 Olas 协议上运行的自主代理正在为零售交易者在 Polymarket 等平台上提供 24/7、策略驱动的优势。

items.title: Custodia’s five-year fight for a Fed master account effectively ends in 7-3 appeals court loss
items.summary: The decision arrives days after the Kansas City Fed granted Kraken the first-ever crypto master account, a landmark for the crypto industry.
items.title_zh: Custodia 为争夺美联储主账户长达五年的斗争最终以 7 比 3 的上诉法庭败诉而告终
items.summary_zh: 这一决定是在堪萨斯城联邦储备银行授予 Kraken 有史以来第一个加密货币主账户几天后做出的，这对于加密货币行业来说是一个里程碑。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Bittensor (TAO)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #36.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Bittensor (TAO)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 36 位。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Bitcoin (BTC)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #1.
items.title_zh: 流行加密货币：比特币 (BTC)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第一。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Solana (SOL)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #7.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Solana (SOL)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第七。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Pi Network (PI)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #45.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Pi Network (PI)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 45 位。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Pudgy Penguins (PENGU)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #104.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：矮胖企鹅 (PENGU)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 104。

items.title: Rakuten fixes issues twice as fast with Codex
items.summary: Rakuten uses Codex, the coding agent from OpenAI, to ship software faster and safer, reducing MTTR 50%, automating CI/CD reviews, and delivering full-stack builds in weeks.
items.title_zh: Rakuten 使用 Codex 解决问题的速度提高了一倍
items.summary_zh: Rakuten 使用 OpenAI 的编码代理 Codex 来更快、更安全地交付软件，将 MTTR 降低 50%，自动化 CI/CD 审查，并在几周内交付全栈构建。

items.title: How Balyasny Asset Management built an AI research engine for investing
items.summary: See how Balyasny built an AI research system with GPT-5.4, rigorous model evaluation, and agent workflows to transform investment analysis at scale.
items.title_zh: Balyasny Asset Management 如何构建用于投资的人工智能研究引擎
items.summary_zh: 了解 Balyasny 如何使用 GPT-5.4、严格的模型评估和代理工作流程构建人工智能研究系统，以大规模转变投资分析。

items.title: Can AI help predict which heart-failure patients will worsen within a year?
items.summary: Researchers at MIT, Mass General Brigham, and Harvard Medical School developed a deep-learning model to forecast a patient’s heart failure prognosis up to a year in advance.
items.title_zh: 人工智能能否帮助预测哪些心力衰竭患者会在一年内病情恶化？
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院、麻省总医院和哈佛医学院的研究人员开发了一种深度学习模型，可以提前一年预测患者的心力衰竭预后。

items.title: New method could increase LLM training efficiency
items.summary: By leveraging idle computing time, researchers can double the speed of model training while preserving accuracy.
items.title_zh: 新方法可以提高LLM培训效率
items.summary_zh: 通过利用空闲计算时间，研究人员可以将模型训练的速度提高一倍，同时保持准确性。

items.title: Lobster buffet: China’s tech firms feast on OpenClaw as companies race to deploy AI agents
items.summary: China-based usage of OpenClaw has already topped that of the U.S., while driving demand for Chinese lower-cost AI models.
items.title_zh: 龙虾自助餐：中国科技公司竞相部署人工智能代理，享受 OpenClaw 盛宴
items.summary_zh: 中国的 OpenClaw 使用量已经超过美国，同时推动了对中国低成本人工智能模型的需求。

items.summary_zh: 这是截至 2026 年 2 月 18 日星期三 Quantocracy 最近推荐的链接的摘要。要查看我们最新的链接，请访问 Quant Mashup。请读者阅读！将日历策略结合到交易组合中 [Quantpedia] 日历策略在以下情况下通常被视为较弱：

items.title: Bitcoin set for best week since September 2025 as correlation with tech stocks weakens
items.summary: Bitcoin is outperforming equities and gold since the Middle East conflict began, as institutional inflows return while broader market sentiment remains cautious.
items.title_zh: 由于与科技股的相关性减弱，比特币创下 2025 年 9 月以来最好的一周
items.summary_zh: 自中东冲突开始以来，随着机构资金回流，而更广泛的市场情绪仍然谨慎，比特币的表现优于股票和黄金。

items.title: Bitwise’s Matt Hougan revisits $1 million bitcoin — analysts agree but debate his timeline
items.summary: Hougan says bitcoin could reach that milestone if it captures a larger share of the global store-of-value market, though analysts say it would likely take years of institutional adoption and macro shifts.
items.title_zh: Bitwise 的 Matt Hougan 重新审视价值 100 万美元的比特币——分析师同意，但对他的时间表存在争议
items.summary_zh: 霍根表示，如果比特币在全球价值存储市场中占据更大份额，它就可能达到这一里程碑，不过分析师表示，这可能需要数年的机构采用和宏观转变。

items.title: Wayfair boosts catalog accuracy and support speed with OpenAI
items.summary: Wayfair uses OpenAI models to improve ecommerce support and product catalog accuracy, automating ticket triage and enhancing millions of product attributes at scale.
items.title_zh: Wayfair 通过 OpenAI 提高目录准确性和支持速度
items.summary_zh: Wayfair 使用 OpenAI 模型来改善电子商务支持和产品目录准确性，自动进行票证分类并大规模增强数百万个产品属性。

items.title: From model to agent: Equipping the Responses API with a computer environment
items.summary: How OpenAI built an agent runtime using the Responses API, shell tool, and hosted containers to run secure, scalable agents with files, tools, and state.
items.title_zh: 从模型到代理：为 Responses API 配备计算机环境
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 如何使用响应 API、shell 工具和托管容器构建代理运行时，以使用文件、工具和状态运行安全、可扩展的代理。

items.title: Improving instruction hierarchy in frontier LLMs
items.summary: IH-Challenge trains models to prioritize trusted instructions, improving instruction hierarchy, safety steerability, and resistance to prompt injection attacks.
items.title_zh: 改善前沿法学硕士的教学层次
items.summary_zh: IH-Challenge 训练模型以优先考虑可信指令，改善指令层次结构、安全可操纵性以及对即时注入攻击的抵抗力。

items.title: Codex Security: now in research preview
items.summary: Codex Security is an AI application security agent that analyzes project context to detect, validate, and patch complex vulnerabilities with higher confidence and less noise.
items.title_zh: Codex 安全性：现在处于研究预览阶段
items.summary_zh: Codex Security 是一款 AI 应用程序安全代理，可分析项目上下文，以更高的置信度和更少的噪音来检测、验证和修补复杂的漏洞。

items.title: How Descript enables multilingual video dubbing at scale
items.summary: Descript uses OpenAI models to scale multilingual video dubbing, optimizing translations for both meaning and timing so dubbed speech sounds natural across languages.
items.title_zh: Descript 如何实现大规模多语言视频配音
items.summary_zh: Descript 使用 OpenAI 模型来扩展多语言视频配音，优化含义和时间的翻译，使配音的语音在不同语言中听起来都很自然。

items.title: PRX Part 3 — Training a Text-to-Image Model in 24h!
items.title_zh: PRX 第 3 部分 — 在 24 小时内训练文本到图像模型！

items.title: How our open-source AI model SpeciesNet is helping to promote wildlife conservation
items.summary: An overview of SpeciesNet, our open-source AI model that is helping people around the world protect and conserve wildlife.
items.title_zh: 我们的开源人工智能模型 SpeciesNet 如何帮助促进野生动物保护
items.summary_zh: SpeciesNet 概述，我们的开源人工智能模型正在帮助世界各地的人们保护野生动物。

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in February
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from February 2026
items.title_zh: 我们二月份公布的最新人工智能新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 2 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite: Built for intelligence at scale
items.summary: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite is our fastest and most cost-efficient Gemini 3 series model yet.
items.title_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite：专为大规模智能而打造
items.summary_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite 是我们迄今为止速度最快、最具成本效益的 Gemini 3 系列型号。

items.title: Google and the Massachusetts AI Hub are launching a new AI training initiative for the Commonwealth.
items.summary: Google is partnering with the Massachusetts AI Hub to provide every Baystater with no-cost access to Google’s AI training.
items.title_zh: 谷歌和马萨诸塞州人工智能中心正在为联邦启动一项新的人工智能培训计划。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌正在与马萨诸塞州人工智能中心合作，为每个 Baystater 提供免费的谷歌人工智能培训机会。

items.title: Get more context and understand translations more deeply with new AI-powered updates in Translate.
items.summary: New alternatives, “understand” and “ask” buttons in Google Translate help you navigate the complexities of natural language.
items.title_zh: 通过 Translate 中新的人工智能驱动的更新，获取更多背景信息并更深入地理解翻译。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌翻译中的新替代方案“理解”和“询问”按钮可帮助您应对自然语言的复杂性。

items.title: 3 Questions: Building predictive models to characterize tumor progression
items.summary: Assistant Professor Matthew Jones is working to decode molecular processes on the genetic, epigenetic, and microenvironment levels to anticipate how and when tumors evolve to resist treatment.
items.title_zh: 3 个问题：建立预测模型来表征肿瘤进展
items.summary_zh: 助理教授 Matthew Jones 致力于解码遗传、表观遗传和微环境水平上的分子过程，以预测肿瘤如何以及何时进化以抵抗治疗。

items.title: How Joseph Paradiso’s sensing innovations bridge the arts, medicine, and ecology
items.summary: From early motion-sensing platforms to environmental monitoring, the professor and head of the Program in Media Arts and Sciences has turned decades of cross-disciplinary research into real-world impact.
items.title_zh: Joseph Paradiso 的传感创新如何架起艺术、医学和生态学的桥梁
items.summary_zh: 从早期的运动传感平台到环境监测，这位教授兼媒体艺术与科学项目的负责人将数十年的跨学科研究转化为现实世界的影响。

items.title: Improving AI models’ ability to explain their predictions
items.summary: A new approach could help users know whether to trust a model’s predictions in safety-critical applications like health care and autonomous driving.
items.title_zh: 提高人工智能模型解释其预测的能力
items.summary_zh: 一种新方法可以帮助用户知道是否信任模型在医疗保健和自动驾驶等安全关键应用中的预测。

items.title: Surging oil prices could wipe out benefits from Trump's 'big beautiful bill'
items.summary: Estimates from Wall Street project that if oil prices stay elevated for too long, consumers will lose as much as they gain from the new tax law.
items.title_zh: 油价飙升可能会消除特朗普“大而美丽的法案”带来的好处
items.summary_zh: 华尔街的估计表明，如果油价长期保持高位，消费者从新税法中得到的损失将与他们从新税法中获得的收益一样多。

items.title: There's another energy market that may get hit harder than oil by Strait of Hormuz closure
items.summary: Roughly 20% of global liquefied natural gas flows through the Strait.
items.title_zh: 霍尔木兹海峡关闭可能会对另一个能源市场造成比石油更严重的打击
items.summary_zh: 全球大约20%的液化天然气流经该海峡。

items.title: How US groups are driving a new generation of anti-abortion activism in the UK
items.summary: The killing of Charlie Kirk galvanised a transatlantic campaign against abortion. But will it succeed in shifting Britain's pro-choice consensus?
items.title_zh: 美国团体如何在英国推动新一代反堕胎活动
items.summary_zh: 查理·柯克被杀引发了跨大西洋反对堕胎的运动。但它能成功改变英国支持堕胎的共识吗？

items.title: Zelensky accuses EU allies of 'blackmail' in oil pipeline row
items.summary: Volodymyr Zelensky says restoring the flow of Russian oil via Ukraine into the EU would be like lifting sanctions on Russia.
items.title_zh: 泽连斯基指责欧盟盟友在石油管道纠纷中“敲诈”
items.summary_zh: 弗拉基米尔·泽连斯基表示，恢复俄罗斯石油经乌克兰进入欧盟就像解除对俄罗斯的制裁一样。

items.title: Ugandan opposition leader tells BBC he fled abroad fearing for his life
items.summary: He says from an undisclosed location: "It was clear that the regime wanted to eliminate me."
items.title_zh: 乌干达反对派领导人告诉 BBC，他因担心生命安全而逃往国外
items.summary_zh: 他在一个秘密地点说道：“很明显，该政权想要消灭我。”

items.title: Iran captain latest footballer to drop asylum bid, Iranian state media says
items.summary: Five of the seven members of the women's football delegation who originally sought to stay in Australia have now chosen to return home.
items.title_zh: 伊朗官方媒体称，伊朗队长最新放弃庇护申请的足球运动员
items.summary_zh: 原本寻求留在澳大利亚的女足代表团七名成员中，现在有五人选择回国。

items.title: French police detain brothers over 'lethal and antisemitic' plot
items.summary: A loaded gun, hydrochloric acid and an Islamic State flag were found in their car, prosecutors say.
items.title_zh: 法国警方因“致命和反犹太”阴谋而拘留兄弟
items.summary_zh: 检察官称，他们的车内发现了一把上膛的枪、盐酸和一面伊斯兰国旗帜。

items.title: Severe flooding kills 66 in Kenya, as heavy rains continue
items.summary: Eleven people were rescued overnight after a minibus taxi got stuck in rising floodwaters in Nairobi.
items.title_zh: 肯尼亚大雨持续，严重洪水造成66人死亡
items.summary_zh: 在内罗毕，一辆小巴出租车被困在不断上涨的洪水中，一夜之间，11 人获救。

items.title: Treasure hunter freed from prison after refusing to turn over shipwreck gold
items.summary: Tommy Thompson spent more than a decade in prison after refusing to disclose the whereabouts of 500 missing gold coins.
items.title_zh: 拒绝交出沉船黄金的寻宝者获释
items.summary_zh: 汤米·汤普森因拒绝透露 500 枚失踪金币的下落而在监狱里度过了十多年。

items.title: Desperation in Cuba Ignites Unusual Acts of Defiance
items.summary: A protest in the city of Morón in central Cuba culminated in fiery vandalism at the local Communist Party headquarters.
items.title_zh: 古巴的绝望引发了不同寻常的反抗行为
items.summary_zh: 古巴中部莫龙市的一场抗议活动最终导致当地共产党总部遭到激烈破坏。

items.title: Marseille’s Tight Mayoral Race Is a Bellwether for France’s Future
items.summary: Voters across France choose mayors this week. The far right is performing strongly in the country’s second city, making the contest there a test of national shifts.
items.title_zh: 马赛激烈的市长竞选是法国未来的风向标
items.summary_zh: 法国各地选民本周将选出市长。极右翼势力在该国第二大城市表现强劲，使得那里的竞选成为对全国转变的考验。

items.title: As Rockets Fly Overhead, Residents of Israel’s Border City Stay Underground
items.summary: The Israeli government evacuated Kiryat Shmona during the last round of fighting with Hezbollah in 2023. Residents who were told it was safe to return are again under fire.
items.title_zh: 当火箭飞过头顶时，以色列边境城市的居民仍待在地下
items.summary_zh: 以色列政府在 2023 年与真主党的最后一轮战斗中撤离了什莫纳镇。被告知可以安全返回的居民再次遭到炮火袭击。

items.title: Iceland’s Chief ‘Lava Cooler’ Is Bracing for the Next Volcanic Eruption
items.summary: Helgi Hjorleifsson, a firefighter, is a leader in a national experiment to steer rivers of lava away from important sites. Some called it crazy, but it worked.
items.title_zh: 冰岛首席“熔岩冷却者”正在为下一次火山喷发做好准备
items.summary_zh: Helgi Hjorleifsson 是一名消防员，他是一项旨在引导熔岩河远离重要地点的国家实验的领导者。有人称其为疯狂，但它确实有效。

items.title: The SEC and CFTC join hands: State of Crypto
items.summary: The SEC and CFTC signed a memorandum of understanding to do a better job providing a combined regulatory approach to the digital asset sector.
items.title_zh: SEC 和 CFTC 携手：加密货币现状
items.summary_zh: 美国证券交易委员会和美国商品期货交易委员会签署了一份谅解备忘录，以更好地为数字资产行业提供综合监管方法。

items.title: Crypto’s age of hype is over, making way for the real infrastructure to be built
items.summary: Nikolic challenges a recent CoinDesk op-ed, declaring "crypto's rock 'n' roll era is over," and argues that it’s the best shift for the industry’s builders.
items.title_zh: 加密货币的炒作时代已经结束，为真正的基础设施建设让路
items.summary_zh: Nikolic 对 CoinDesk 最近的一篇专栏文章提出质疑，宣称“加密货币的摇滚时代已经结束”，并认为这对于该行业的建设者来说是最好的转变。

items.title: Here is why Nasdaq and owner of NYSE are putting the $126 trillion equity market on blockchain
items.summary: The race for the "everything exchange" makes Wall Street operators and crypto exchanges rivals and partners at the same time.
items.title_zh: 这就是纳斯达克和纽约证券交易所的所有者将 126 万亿美元的股票市场置于区块链上的原因
items.summary_zh: “万物交易所”的争夺使华尔街运营商和加密货币交易所同时成为竞争对手和合作伙伴。

items.title: Visa is ready for AI agents. So is Coinbase. They're building very different internets
items.summary: The next trillion-dollar payments network won't have a checkout page. No card number, no CVV, no human at the keyboard. Just machines paying machines, thousands of times a second, for fractions of a cent.
items.title_zh: Visa 已为人工智能代理做好准备。 Coinbase 也是如此。他们正在构建截然不同的互联网
items.summary_zh: 下一个万亿美元的支付网络将不会有结帐页面。没有卡号、没有 CVV、没有人敲键盘。只是机器向机器付款，每秒数千次，费用不到一分钱。

items.title: Hoskinson might be wrong about the future of decentralized compute
items.summary: Cardano’s founder recently made an argument about hyperscalers that needs to be addressed, says Fan.
items.title_zh: 霍斯金森对去中心化计算未来的看法可能是错误的
items.summary_zh: 范说，卡尔达诺的创始人最近提出了一个关于需要解决的超大规模的争论。

items.title: Probe reveals document detailing alleged $5 million deal linking Milei to Libra promotion: report
items.summary: Forensic call logs from the same device show frantic communication between Milei and associates in the hours surrounding the token's collapse.
items.title_zh: 调查披露文件详细说明了 Milei 与 Libra 促销活动之间涉嫌 500 万美元的交易：报告
items.summary_zh: 来自同一设备的取证通话记录显示，在代币崩溃前后的几个小时内，Milei 和同事之间进行了疯狂的通信。

items.title: Aave and CoW Swap publish dueling post-mortems after $50 million DeFi swap disaster
items.summary: CoW Swap's post-mortem reveals that the transaction, initially submitted via a private RPC, apparently leaked to the public mempool.
items.title_zh: Aave 和 CoW Swap 在 5000 万美元的 DeFi 互换灾难后发布了对立的事后分析
items.summary_zh: CoW Swap 的事后分析显示，最初通过私有 RPC 提交的交易显然已泄露到公共内存池。

items.title: Venus Protocol left with roughly $2M in bad debt after exploit manipulates Thena’s THE token price
items.summary: The attack used a donation mechanism to bypass Venus's supply cap, a similar mechanism to the infamous Mango Markets exploit in 2022.
items.title_zh: 在利用操纵 Thena 代币价格后，Venus Protocol 留下了大约 200 万美元的坏账
items.summary_zh: 这次攻击使用了捐赠机制来绕过 Venus 的供应上限，这与 2022 年臭名昭著的 Mango Markets 漏洞类似。

items.title: SEC dismisses civil fraud case against BitClout, DeSo founder Nader Al-Naji with prejudice
items.summary: The SEC in 2024 had accused Al-Naji of allegedly spending more than $7 million of investor funds on personal expenses.
items.title_zh: SEC 带着偏见驳回针对 BitClout 和 DeSo 创始人 Nader Al-Naji 的民事欺诈案
items.summary_zh: 2024 年，SEC 指控 Al-Naji 涉嫌将超过 700 万美元的投资者资金用于个人开支。

items.title: IRS crypto reporting rules set stage for confusing tax season: Here’s what you need to know
items.summary: Traders involved in DeFi and have transactions and transfers between multiple wallets and exchanges will face more challenges.
items.title_zh: 美国国税局的加密货币报告规则为令人困惑的纳税季节奠定了基础：以下是您需要了解的内容
items.summary_zh: 参与 DeFi 并在多个钱包和交易所之间进行交易和转账的交易者将面临更多挑战。

items.title: Billionaire investor Druckenmiller says ‘quicker, cheaper’ stablecoins could power payments in 10-15 years
items.summary: Druckenmiller argued that stablecoins could meaningfully boost financial system productivity by making payments faster and cheaper.
items.title_zh: 亿万富翁投资者德鲁肯米勒表示，“更快、更便宜”的稳定币可以在 10-15 年内为支付提供动力
items.summary_zh: 德鲁肯米勒认为，稳定币可以通过使支付更快、更便宜来有意义地提高金融系统的生产力。

items.title: How Superstate tokenized Galaxy’s stock and what’s coming next

items.title: OpenAI to acquire Promptfoo
